description: Verification runners shipped by the Layers appview. Each runner produces signed dev.idiolect.verification records attesting a property of a pub.layers.* lens or schema.

runners.name: layers_roundtrip
runners.description: Runs put(get(x))==x over a corpus of pub.layers.* records for a given PanprotoLens.

runners.name: layers_static_check
runners.description: Runs panproto::check::validate on a lens against its source/target schemas.
